title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries. Police are investigating a 'planned fight' as the cause.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in public spaces and its devastating impact on communities.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC, on May 13-14, 2026.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science and engineering within the Charlotte region.

title: Teens Charged in Chesterfield County Shooting Death
summary: Three teenagers have been charged in connection with the shooting death of a 20-year-old in Chesterfield County. The investigation is ongoing.
charlotte_impact: Addresses youth violence and its consequences within the local community.

title: CMS Board Debates Budget Priorities Amid Financial Constraints
summary: The Charlotte-Mecklenburg School Board is re-evaluating its 2026-27 budget, focusing on equitable resource allocation after rejecting an initial proposal.
charlotte_impact: Impacts the quality and accessibility of education for students in the Charlotte-Mecklenburg area.

title: Drone Crash Sparks Fire in Burke County Woods
summary: A fire was ignited by a crashed personal drone near Lovelady Road in Burke County. Firefighters successfully contained the blaze.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates potential hazards associated with recreational drone use and the importance of fire safety.

title: Wadesboro Mayor Pro Tem Arrested for Threatening Officer
summary: Wadesboro's mayor pro tem was arrested and charged with communicating threats to a law enforcement officer.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about ethical conduct and accountability among local government officials.

title: Rain Expected Mid-Week After Warm Tuesday
summary: The forecast predicts a chance of rain on Thursday, following a warm Tuesday.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather updates relevant to daily life and planning for residents.

title: Shooting in West Charlotte Injures One
summary: A shooting occurred on Hoskins Mill Lane in west Charlotte, resulting in one injury.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and crime rates in specific neighborhoods.

title: Residents Oppose Proposed Hotel on Mayes Road
summary: Residents in Cornelius are opposing a proposed hotel, citing concerns about its impact on the area's residential character and local wildlife.
charlotte_impact: Reflects community concerns about overdevelopment and its potential negative effects.

title: Charlotte Considers Property Tax Increase in 2027
summary: The Charlotte city manager has proposed a 1.89 cent property tax increase for 2027, which would amount to approximately $5.71 extra per month for the average homeowner.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential changes in property taxes and their financial implications.

title: Hornets Mark Milestone for Novant Health Performance Center
summary: The Charlotte Hornets celebrated a construction milestone for their future Novant Health Performance Center.
charlotte_impact: Signifies investment in local sports infrastructure and the team's commitment to the community.

title: CMPD Chief Focuses on Internal Department Improvement
summary: CMPD Chief Estella Patterson is prioritizing strengthening the police department from within to enhance public safety in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights efforts to improve law enforcement effectiveness and community relations.

title: Mass Casualty Incident at Iredell County Farm Party
summary: A large party at Healing Chamber Farms in Iredell County resulted in a mass casualty incident, with numerous medical needs reported.
charlotte_impact: Underlines the potential risks associated with large gatherings and the strain on emergency services.

title: Fatal Shooting in Huntersville Under Investigation
summary: Huntersville Police are investigating the fatal shooting of a 20-year-old Charlotte man.
charlotte_impact: Adds to concerns about violent crime and its impact on young people in the region.

title: Charlotte Faces Severe Drought Conditions
summary: Charlotte is experiencing its worst drought in nearly 20 years, leading to brown lawns, stressed trees, and impending mandatory watering restrictions.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental challenges and the need for water conservation measures.
